scroll_found.title: Research the Eldritch Theory scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: The End Endermen know something. They drop the scroll at 5%. Farm enough of them and eventually they share it.

description: CH.09 · ELDRITCH THEORY
▸ The Eldritch school of Iron's Spellbooks
is the final school unlocked.
It does not exist in overworld magic.
It only exists in the End.
The scroll confirms why.
◈ ELDRITCH SCHOOL (ISS)
└ Material: Echo Shard (harvested from Ancient Cities
and End dimension loot)
└ Spells include:
✦ Void Lasso: pull target toward you
✦ Ender Shriek: AoE stagger, silence nearby mobs
✦ Phase Step: short-range blink through walls
✦ Eldritch Blast: void-damage ranged projectile
└ Level III Eldritch: requires high mana capacity,
End-tier materials, arcane worktable
└ Eldritch spells give bonus XP when cast
(Puffish Skills — fastest way to level Eldritch tree)
◈ ENDERMAN DROP CONTEXT
└ 5% drop — requires Enderman farm to guarantee
└ Best farm location: End island plateau above portal
└ Enderman Overhaul adds 20+ variants in the End
(different biomes yield different variant types)
└ Looting III sword increases effective drop rate
◈ SCROLL: Eldritch Theory
└ 5% drop from Endermen in The End
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: Eldritch school full spell list,
Echo Shard as school reagent, void damage type
▸ The End Endermen are not like overworld Endermen.
They have been here longer.
They carry something in them
that the overworld versions left behind.
The scroll is that something, written down.
▶ Find the Eldritch Theory scroll [check]
▶ Collect 4 Echo Shards
◇ Echo Shards also drop from Ancient City chests.
Farm both zones — the Warden fight (Ch08)
and the End Endermen — simultaneously.
